---
name: keyboard-first-ui
description: Designing keyboard-first interaction models and shortcut systems for TUI and GUI surfaces.
---

# Keyboard-First UI Skill

## When to Use

- Defining shortcut maps for common and high-frequency actions
- Building fast navigation and command palettes
- Aligning behavior between TUI and GUI interfaces

## Expectations

1. Every frequent action has a discoverable shortcut.
2. Shortcuts are consistent and conflict-aware.
3. Focus management is explicit and predictable.
4. Pointer-based UI should complement, not replace, keyboard flow.
